label: KarooDash
description:
Your ride pages, your rules.

KarooDash turns Karoo into a fully configurable training computer. Build your own field grids (from 1x1 up to 5x3), pick the metrics, colors and charts, then drop them onto ride pages as a "Dashboard" field - next to the map or full screen.

DATA
Over 90 metrics in one place: speed and distance, power (IF, TSS, NP, kJ, 30 s), heart rate and %HRR, cadence, laps, Strava Live Segments, Climber data and drivetrain. Heart rate and power are colored automatically using the zones from your Karoo profile; every other field can use your own color thresholds.

LIVE CHARTS
13 graphical cells drawn in real time: power, heart rate, speed and elevation lines, time in zones, a live zone bar, a %FTP arc, the next 5 km climb profile and a wind rose.

WEATHER AND RADAR
Open-Meteo forecast (ICON-D2 model over Poland and Central Europe): wind relative to your heading, rain in X minutes, feels-like temperature and weather ahead on your route. The built-in precipitation radar (RainViewer) covers 30-240 km and works even without WiFi - through your phone.

SPECIAL SCREENS
Full-page climb profile with a list, POIs with distance and ETA, and the rain radar.

Available in English and Polish (Settings -> Language, defaults to your device language). Designed to stay readable in bright sunlight and easy to use with gloves. Always dark.
releaseNotes: 4.1: the Climbs screen now detects gentle long rises and honors the elevation-gain threshold from Settings (flat routes no longer show nothing). Earlier: auto-fit field values, high-contrast headers, full English localization.
